Interface IFeatureDataset

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to create a new feature class in a feature dataset.

[Guid("D4803EE3-79F4-11D0-97FC-0080C7F79481")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IFeatureDataset : IDataset
